name: Witchcrafter Distortion
desc: When a Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated and you control a Level 5 or higher "Witchcrafter" monster: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card. If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can banish it; add 1 Level 5 or higher Spellcaster monster from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Witchcrafter Distortion" once per turn.
